name: Montana Capital Car Title Loans
description_short: Norman, OK location of Montana Capital Car Title Loans provides title loans and payday advances with quick approval.
description_long:
Montana Capital Car Title Loans in Norman, OK operates from a standalone storefront at 133 N Santa Fe Ave b. The Norman location is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, Saturdays from 10 AM to 5 PM, and closed Sundays. This convenient location serves residents across Norman and the surrounding Oklahoma area.

At this Norman, OK branch, you can apply for car title loans, payday advances, and personal loans. The team specializes in quick approvals for customers who need immediate cash. Call the Norman store at +1 580-324-0650 to discuss your borrowing options, ask about rates, or apply over the phone.

Norman residents typically visit this Montana Capital Car Title Loans location when they need fast cash between paychecks or want to leverage their vehicle equity. Bring your driver's license, proof of income, and vehicle registration to speed up the application process. The straightforward application means many customers get funded the same day.
address: 133 N Santa Fe Ave b, Norman, OK 73069

company_info.headquarters: 133 N Santa Fe Ave b, Norman, OK 73069

pros: Same-day funding available — funds disbursed within 24 hours of approval
No credit check required; bad credit and prior bankruptcies explicitly accepted
Free pre-approval in under 5 minutes with no impact to credit score
Borrower keeps and drives the vehicle throughout the entire loan term
Wide loan range from $100 to $50,000 based on vehicle equity
Online applications available 24/7 with phone support at 1-888-508-5366
4.5-star Google rating with reviewers citing fast processing and helpful staff
cons: APR and fee structure not disclosed publicly on the website — a major transparency gap for borrowers comparing costs
Disbursement is a Bank of America check, not instant cash — requires an extra bank trip per customer reviews
Vehicle repossession is a real consequence of default; borrowers risk losing primary transportation
Only 59 Google reviews for a company claiming 375,000+ customers served — limited independent verification
Title loans are inherently high-cost credit; not suitable as a recurring or long-term financing solution
best_for: Car owners with bad credit or bankruptcies who cannot qualify for personal loans
Borrowers facing a same-day emergency expense who have equity in their vehicle
People needing more than a payday loan ($1,000–$50,000) but without bank-qualifying credit
Those who need to keep driving their car and cannot surrender the vehicle as collateral elsewhere
diagnosis: Montana Capital is best for car owners with poor or no credit who face an urgent, short-term cash need and have equity in their vehicle — particularly those who have been rejected by traditional lenders. The main caveat is cost: title loans carry some of the highest APRs in consumer lending, and Montana Capital does not disclose rates upfront, making it difficult to compare before applying. Default risk is serious — non-payment leads to vehicle repossession, which can create cascading financial hardship.
services: Free pre-approval with no credit score impact
Bank of America check pickup option
meta_description: Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 133 N Santa Fe Ave b in Norman, OK. Quick title loans and cash advances.
